pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x is incompatible with Java 21; the application will fail to compile or run due to removed APIs and bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The compiler will reject Java 21 syntax or fail to target the correct bytecode version if the property remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from unboundid-ldapsdk to rely on Spring Boot's managed dependency version.
Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to support modern Java and security standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: HttpClient 4.x may have compatibility issues or lack support in newer Spring Boot versions; HttpClient 5 is the current standard.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava version to 29.0-jre for test scope to ensure compatibility with newer Java versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may contain bugs or incompatibilities with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 to rely on Spring Boot's managed dependency version.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.general_idea: Replace deprecated Integer constructor with Integer.valueOf to comply with Java 21 standards.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/authenticato.why_exists: The Integer(int) constructor is deprecated since Java 9 and may be removed in future releases; using it can cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/LDA.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.general_idea: Add import for the new @Serial annotation introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available in Java 8, causing a compilation error if used without the import in Java 21.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Mar.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, using @Serial is the modern standard for serial version UIDs in Java 16+ to avoid warnings and ensure correct serialization behavior.

Class.newInstance() is deprecated for removal in Java 17+ and throws InstantiationException instead of InvocationTargetException, breaking error handling patterns and causing compilation warnings/errors in strict Java 21 environments.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Pro.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/main/java/com.marklogic/handlers/Sea.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization best practices.
Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..before: String.format("Cannot have offset of %d and length of %d with array of length %d", off, len, source.length)
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..after: "Cannot have offset of %d and length of %d with array of length %d".formatted(off, len, source.length)

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..before: String.format("Source array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and still process four bytes.", source.length, srcOffset)
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..after: "Source array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and still process four bytes.".formatted(source.length, srcOffset)

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..before: String.format("Destination array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and still store three bytes.", destination.length, destOffset)
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..after: "Destination array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and still store three bytes.".formatted(destination.length, destOffset)

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..before: String.format("Source array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and process %d bytes.", source.length, off, len)
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..after: "Source array with length %d cannot have offset of %d and process %d bytes.".formatted(source.length, off, len)

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..before: String.format("Bad Base64 input character decimal %d in array position %d", ((int) source[i]) & 0xFF, i)
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Base64..after: "Bad Base64 input character decimal %d in array position %d".formatted(((int) source[i]) & 0xFF, i)

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Replace deprecated Apache HttpClient 4.x imports with Apache HttpClient 5.x (HC5) equivalents.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: Apache HttpClient 4.x classes are removed or incompatible in the new dependency version; code fails to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Update variable type from HttpRequestBase to HttpUriRequestBase to match HC5 API.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: HttpRequestBase class is removed in HC5; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.general_idea: Replace direct instantiation of DefaultHttpClient with HttpClients.createDefault() factory method.
src/main/java/com/duoauth/client/Http.ja.why_exists: DefaultHttpClient class is removed in HC5; code fails to compile.

src/test/java/com/marklogic/MLEAProxyTes.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations and runner to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) API.
src/test/java/com/marklogic/MLEAProxyTes.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 test engines, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute in a JUnit 5 environment.
